title: Project Timeline
subtitle:
Key milestones from the first commit through present day
Framework architecture, UI system, persistence, and developer tooling.

items.title: First Commit
items.subtitle: Initial repo created; voluntary.net codebase imported as foundation

items.title: Slot System
items.subtitle: Property declaration via slots with type annotations and inspection

items.title: Browser UI
items.subtitle: StackView column navigation, row tiles, drag-and-drop, and gestures

items.title: IndexedDB Store
items.subtitle: Persistent object pool with dirty tracking and automatic commits

items.title: Flex Layout
items.subtitle: DomSplitView and flexible layout system for browser columns

items.title: Image & Blob
items.subtitle: Image wells, blob drops, MIME type support, and drag views

items.title: Tile System
items.subtitle: BrowserRows renamed to Tiles; tile-based navigation pattern solidified

items.title: Content Store
items.subtitle: Content-addressable blob storage with hash-based caching

items.title: Themes
items.subtitle: Theme system for customizable visual appearance

items.title: WebRTC
items.subtitle: PeerJS integration for real-time peer-to-peer communication

items.title: Resource Loader
items.subtitle: Rebuilt resource loading system with global compatibility fixes

items.title: Boot Overhaul
items.subtitle: Major cleanup of boot process, index building, and eval debugging

items.title: CAM Build
items.subtitle: Content-addressable memory build system with hash validation

items.title: Breadcrumbs
items.subtitle: BreadCrumbRowView for hierarchical navigation context

items.title: Tile Rename
items.subtitle: RowViews renamed to Tiles throughout the framework

items.title: Object Pool
items.subtitle: Major fixes for ObjectPool persistence, key handling, and event listeners

items.title: App Bootstrap
items.subtitle: Standardized App shared() pattern and resource setup

items.title: Blob Cache
items.subtitle: Content-addressable blob cache for efficient binary storage

items.title: Blob Persistence
items.subtitle: Full support for persisting blobs with reference tracking and GC

items.title: WebRTC Service
items.subtitle: WebRTC service layer for peer connection management

items.title: HaveWords App
items.subtitle: First major application built on STRVCT; later became Undreamed Of

items.title: Music Library
items.subtitle: Audio playback infrastructure for music and sound effects

items.title: Error Handling
items.subtitle: Error.rethrow() for chained error context; improved debugging

items.title: Init Refactor
items.subtitle: Split initPrototypeSlots and initPrototype for cleaner class setup

items.title: Documentation
items.subtitle: Comprehensive docs site with architecture guides and API reference

items.title: Slot Maps
items.subtitle: allSlotsMap fixes; improved slot introspection and enumeration

items.title: AI Services
items.subtitle: AI service abstraction layer supporting multiple providers

items.title: Assistant API
items.subtitle: Generalized AI Assistant and conversation management system

items.title: Tool Calls
items.subtitle: Structured tool calling system for AI function invocation

items.title: Prompt Composer
items.subtitle: Template-based prompt composition with file inclusion and variable substitution

items.title: JSON Schema
items.subtitle: Schema validation for model classes; AI-compatible type definitions

items.title: Cloud Sync
items.subtitle: Firebase Storage sync with write-ahead delta logs

items.title: JSON Patches
items.subtitle: RFC 6902 JSON Patch support for incremental model updates

items.title: Image Gen
items.subtitle: Image generation pipeline with evaluation and scaling

items.title: Docs Site
items.subtitle: Documentation site with layout engine, cards, and markdown support

items.title: Internationalization
items.subtitle: AI-powered UI translation with per-language IndexedDB and automatic model-to-view boundary translation

items.title: Anchor Scroll
items.subtitle: AI chat anchor scrolling and scroll-to-bottom button

items.title: Battery Aware
items.subtitle: Battery level monitoring for performance throttling detection

items.title: AI Image Editor
items.subtitle: Gemini-based image editing and scaling class hierarchy

items.title: Public Cloud
items.subtitle: SvPublicCloudSource for serving shared content via Firebase Storage manifests
